Entries.{{ModID}}_SeekingTheCure/f FC.John 1500/: echos/-1000 -1000/farmer 97 83 2 FC.John 98 91 3 FC.Roger 99 92 3/viewport 98 91 clamp true/addTemporaryActor FC.DezerieCammi 32 48 95 91 2 false/animate FC.DezerieCammi false true 360 0 1 2 3/changeName FC.DezerieCammi Dezerie/addLantern 735 94 92 1/skippable/pause 1000/move farmer 0 5 2 true/speak FC.DezerieCammi "I can't promise results. I'm not a miracle worker in the slightest."/pause 100/speak FC.John "I know...But please, try one last time?$2"/pause 100/speak FC.DezerieCammi "I will once more, I am a woman of my word.$2#$b#This illness, you say regular doctor's are unable to cure it?"/pause 100/speak FC.John "Doctor Harvey, he said it was an chronic illness...Fatigue Disorder and Arthitis.$2"/pause 100/speak FC.John "I don't want to be sick anymore...$2"/pause 100/textAboveHead FC.Roger "John."/pause 100/faceDirection FC.John 2/pause 100/speak FC.Roger "This feels, wrong to me, I don't think drinking some random woman's tonic is a good idea...And it didn't work last time remember?$2"/pause 100/emote FC.John 12/pause 100/stopAnimation FC.DezerieCammi 3/pause 100/speak FC.John "She's not a random woman, she's a friend.$5#$b#And...This is the last time, I promise.$2"/pause 100/faceDirection FC.John 3/move farmer 0 2 2 true/speak FC.DezerieCammi "Roger, I am here to help, you might be in your brother's place one day, so be a little more polite.$5#$b#And John,With Roger's contribution, the tonic might work...But again, it might not...Drink this at yor own risk.$2"/pause 100/move FC.John -1 0 3/emote FC.Roger 12/pause 1000/question fork0 "Should you say something?#Say Something quickly.#Stay Silent.#"/fork FC.BeSilent/pause 100/speak FC.Roger "@, say something would ya?!$3"/showFrame FC.John 21/animate FC.John false false 360 21 22 23 24 24 24 24 23 22 21/pause 2000/stopAnimation FC.John 20/pause 1000/animate FC.John false true 700 19 20/pause 1000/stopAnimation FC.John 0/speak FC.John "Yuck! That was disgusting!$8"/pause 100/emote FC.John 28/faceDirection FC.John 3/pause 100/speak FC.John "I...I don't feel any different.$2"/pause 200/showFrame FC.DezerieCammi 7/speak FC.DezerieCammi "I'm so sorry John, I don't think it worked..."/pause 100/speak FC.John "...$2#$b#I'm sorry I wasted your time Dezerie...Thank you for everything.$3"/faceDirection FC.John 1/textAboveHead FC.John "Let's just go home."/pause 100/viewport move -1 0 6000000/pause 800/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/friendship FC.John 15/addConversationTopic FC.JohnsDesperation 10/end
Entries.FC.BeSilent: pause 100/speak FC.John "Why is everyone in my life trying to stop me?! I just want to feel better.$5"/pause 200/emote FC.John 28/speak FC.Roger "We're just worried, we want to protect you...Even Dezerie has given you warning's, you should try to accept yourself John.$5"/pause 100/speak FC.DezerieCammi "Roger's right, I'm so sorry John, I don't think it will work...It'll probably just make you sick to your stomach...$2"/pause 200/speak FC.John "I...You all are right, I'm sorry...$2"/friendship FC.John -15/pause 100/viewport move -1 0 6000000/pause 800/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/addConversationTopic FC.JohnsDisappointment 10/end

Entries.{{ModID}}_PopsNewHome/e {{ModID}}_PopHun: XOR/-1000 -1000/farmer 67 76 0 FC.John -3000 -3000 2 FC.Popper 70 73 2/viewport 67 75 clamp true/skippable/showFrame FC.Popper 29/positionOffset FC.Popper 0 20/extendSourceRect FC.Popper 32 0 false/pause 1000/shake FC.Popper 500/pause 200/emote FC.Popper 40/shake FC.Popper 500/pause 200/emote FC.Popper 12/pause 500/textAboveHead FC.Popper "Help!!!"/move farmer 0 -1 0/pause 100/warp FC.John 68 74/pause 200/emote FC.John 8/faceDirection FC.John 3/faceDirection FC.John 1/playSound thunder/screenFlash 1/screenShake 3 5/textAboveHead FC.Popper "Ahh! Help!"/pause 100/speak FC.Popper "This it, this is end for Pop!$5"/pause 1200/speak FC.John "Stay calm let me help you.$8"/pause 100/move FC.John 3 0 0/pause 1000/faceDirection FC.John 3/pause 100/speak FC.John "It's jamed! @ would you lift the door while I pull Pop in from inside the temple?$2"/question fork0 "Pop needs you!#I'm on it!#Do it yourself.#"/fork FC.HelpPop/pause 100/emote FC.John 12/pause 100/speak FC.John "Alright fine, I'll do it on my own!$5"/pause 100/speed FC.John 3/move FC.John -3 0 0/warp FC.John -3000 -3000/playSound doorClose/pause 300/playSound thunder/screenFlash 1/textAboveHead FC.Popper "Waaah!"/pause 3000/shake FC.Popper 500/emote FC.Popper 8/pause 500/warp FC.Popper -3000 -3000/playsound pickUpItem/pause 2000/warp FC.John 68 74/playSound doorClose/faceDirection FC.John 2/pause 100/speak FC.John "Alright, he's safe now, no thanks to you!$5#$b#I'll take care of him, poor thing is terrified...$3#$b#I can't beleive you'd be so heartless.$5#$b#Just go away I guess, you've been a real card @.$5"/pause 800/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/friendship FC.Popper 20/message "John helped Pop, but now you're on his bad side for not helping."/addConversationTopic FC.JohnsBadSide 7/friendship FC.Popper -20/friendship FC.John -20/end
Entries.FC.HelpPop: pause 100/speak FC.John "Alright, I'll let you know when I'm inside."/pause 100/speed FC.John 3/move FC.John -3 0 0/warp FC.John -3000 -3000/playSound doorClose/pause 300/move farmer 0 -2 1/move farmer 3 0 0/playSound thunder/screenFlash 1/textAboveHead FC.Popper "Waaah!"/pause 3000/speak FC.John "Okay, lift it up!$3"/showFrame farmer 63/startJittering/shake FC.Popper 500/emote FC.Popper 8/pause 500/warp FC.Popper -3000 -3000/playsound pickUpItem/showFrame 12/pause 2000/warp FC.John 68 74/playSound doorClose/faceDirection FC.John 1/move farmer -2 0 3/pause 100/speak FC.John "I think he's okay, just very shaken up...I think I'll ask him to stay for the night...It wouldn't feel right if I sent him out in this storm.$2#$b#Thank you @, It would have been way harder getting him free alone, you've a beautiful heart.$1"/pause 800/globalFade/viewport -1000 -1000/friendship FC.Popper 20/message "Poor Pop, that must have been so scary."/addConversationTopic FC.JohnsGoodSide 7/friendship FC.Popper -20/friendship FC.John -20/end
